q: She blended the batter ______ a blender.
It's Anu's birthday some time ______ the middle of May, I think.
This boy is quick ______ inventing excuses.
This city is famous ______ its sights.
My friends were waiting for me ______ the station.
Hasn't television deprived today's children ______ healthy outdoor games?
I have invited Russell ______ the dinner.
Look at the cat happily basking ______ the sun.
The professor ______ South Africa amazed the American students with her stories.
Where is Sheila? She is sitting ______ the dining table having lunch.
I am looking ______ my keys which are lost.
______ being intelligent, he is also resourceful.
